# Intelligence Archive — Blog by Abhay Singh Yadav

Reflections from the intersection of law, leadership, and social consciousness.

## About

Intelligence Archive is a blog platform featuring articles on law, leadership, social consciousness, and academic life. Written by Abhay Singh Yadav, an LLB (Hons.) student at Lucknow University.

## Author

- Name: Abhay Singh Yadav
- University: Lucknow University
- Degree: LLB (Hons.)
- Focus: Law, Leadership, Social Work

https://www.dikshantyadav.in
